text: Adobe retains strong competitive positioning as a recognized leader in the Ecommerce Platform Companies Quadrant alongside Shopify and Wix [C028]. The company is well-positioned to capitalize on the Global Motion Graphics Market, which is projected to reach $280 billion by 2034 at a 12.2% CAGR [C033].

revision_history.original_text: Adobe retains strong competitive positioning as a recognized leader in the Ecommerce Platform Companies Quadrant alongside Shopify and Wix [C097, C028]. The company is well-positioned to capitalize on the Global Motion Graphics Market, which is projected to reach $280 billion by 2034 at a 12.2% CAGR [C033]. RBC Capital identifies long-term AI monetization upside for Adobe, suggesting the company is well-positioned to integrate AI into creative and experience tools [C107]. However, competitive dynamics have intensified following Google's announcement of enhanced image editing capabilities in its Gemini app, which contributed to investor concerns about Adobe's dominance in digital imaging [C112].
